audit_scope.note: SUDD is a Go CLI + embedded markdown framework; NO HTTP backend and NO frontend. There is no fe_codeintel.json — correct absence, not a gap. All 'pages' / 'api_endpoints' arrays from the stock change-scope schema are intentionally empty. The routing surface is instead the cobra CLI command tree + the state.json / markdown file tree, captured in cli_surface and state_surface below.
audit_scope.persona_target: sudd/personas/default.md — Stefano / Framework Owner (single enriched persona)

auth.note: No HTTP auth surface. The only auth concepts are (a) CLI tool presence checks in internal/doctor/ and (b) per-tier auth checks (claude CLI auth, opencode auth) verified by `sudd doctor`.

cli_surface.tests: none (no audit_test.go at CLI or internal/auto/audit.go)

cli_surface.persona_linked_objective: obj#2 (autonomous progress — fails loud, never silent)

cli_surface_discrepancies.finding: sudd/codebase-manifest.json:92 advertises a `fleet` CLI subcommand, but sudd-go/cmd/sudd/fleet.go registers no cobra command (no init(), no rootCmd.AddCommand). Fleet behavior is available only through --all-siblings flags on status/update/metrics/diagnose.
cli_surface_discrepancies.impact: Operators / audit agents reading the manifest and running `sudd fleet status` get 'unknown command'. Misleading; does not break any workflow.

state_surface.atomicity: NON-ATOMIC (os.WriteFile, no tmp+fsync+rename) — VIOLATES framework invariant
raw_map_fields: stats.{tasks_completed, tasks_stuck, tasks_blocked, total_retries, total_done_dirty, stats_seeded}
retry_count, tests_passed, gate_passed, personas_validated, architecture_reviewed, design_gate_passed, gate_score, design_gate_score
state_surface.persona_linked_objective: obj#2 (autonomous progress) + obj#3 (understand what happened) — state.json is the primary source of truth for 'what happened'

agent_surface.guardrail_gap: live agent count asserted != 0, but NOT compared against embedded template count (sudd-go/cmd/sudd/templates/sudd/agents/). The v3.8.x self-wipe pattern is still reachable if templates drift below live.

data_flows.verification: After `sudd auto` completes, every queued change must appear exactly once in one of archive/dirty/stuck; state.json.auto_session.changes_processed length must equal queue length minus skipped.
data_flows.persona_objective: obj#1 + obj#3 (verify working, understand what changed)

data_flows.verification: Headings in lessons.md match the archival outcome tier; no STUCK change carries a ### [DONE] heading.
data_flows.known_defect: Multiple active proposals (discovered_audit_lesson-heading-matches-outcome_01) flagged stale heading mismatches — fixed per commit 7678260 but regression guard limited.

data_flows.writes_to: sudd/audit/audit.log (truncated), sudd/audit/{codeintel.json, manifest.json, rubric.md, report.md, screenshots/, browser-reports/}
data_flows.verification: After audit, report.md exists with EXCELLENT|GOOD|NEEDS_WORK|CRITICAL header; state.json audit.last_audit_at is set to now; gap proposals land in sudd/changes/active/.
data_flows.risk: RunAudit swallows subprocess exit-code classification (timeout vs quota vs crash) — operator cannot triage without reading audit.log tail.

data_flows.verification: Every update produces a snapshot AND shrink-gate refuses writes that drop a file >50% or to 0 bytes.
data_flows.persona_objective: obj#2 (recovery — fleet-wide outage must be one-command recoverable)

unified_concerns.title: state.json written non-atomically — single most load-bearing file violates framework's own atomic-write invariant
unified_concerns.evidence: sudd-go/internal/auto/state.go:178 uses os.WriteFile. Compare atomic writers at sudd-go/internal/state/write.go:78 (writeAtomic) and sudd-go/internal/vision/vision.go:86 (atomicWrite).
unified_concerns.persona_impact: obj#2 (autonomous progress — silent-fails on crash), obj#3 (understand what changed — lost stats), obj#4 (stuck diagnosis — corrupt state.json produces 'parse state.json' fatal at next LoadState, auto.go:177).
unified_concerns.vision_promise_violated: vision.md line ~203: 'Fail loud at session start, never silently mid-run.' and line ~277: 'Preflight blocks on any failure — silent success is never acceptable.'
unified_concerns.remediation: Replace os.WriteFile with writeAtomic pattern (copy from internal/state/write.go:78).

unified_concerns.title: SaveState failures in `sudd auto` swallow errors with only stderr warnings
unified_concerns.evidence: sudd-go/cmd/sudd/auto.go lines 186, 282, 377, 394, 410, 423, 464, 545, 603, 615 — all use `if saveErr != nil { fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: ...") }` with no abort.
unified_concerns.persona_impact: obj#2 violated directly — an overnight auto run with disk full / read-only FS / perms regression produces stderr warnings that nobody reads while the loop processes changes whose state can never be persisted. Stefano returns to a partial/corrupt state.json and no visible failure indicator.
unified_concerns.vision_promise_violated: vision.md ~203: 'Fail loud at session start, never silently mid-run.' + user-memory note: 'Preflight blocks by default, never silent-fails.'
unified_concerns.remediation: Abort the loop after N consecutive SaveState failures, or escalate to STUCK and write a FAILURE.md. At minimum, bump a `save_failures` counter in state.json itself (which, of course, requires atomic writes first).

unified_concerns.title: Manifest drift: `fleet` CLI command advertised but not registered
unified_concerns.evidence: sudd/codebase-manifest.json:92 lists fleet; sudd-go/cmd/sudd/fleet.go contains only helpers (statusAllSiblingsRun, updateAllSiblingsRun, readSuddVersion); no cobra registration.
unified_concerns.persona_impact: obj#3 (understand what the system does) — documentation lies to operator.
unified_concerns.vision_promise_violated: vision.md 'Fleet management (v3.8.21)' promises `sudd status --all-siblings` and friends — the flag form is correct; the manifest's freestanding `fleet` entry is not.
unified_concerns.remediation: Either (a) register a real `fleet` cobra command that dispatches to the helpers, or (b) delete the manifest entry and update codebase-explorer regeneration rules to not re-emit it.

unified_concerns.title: `sudd audit` has no Go-level tests and no subprocess-outcome classification
unified_concerns.evidence: sudd-go/cmd/sudd/audit.go has no *_test.go; sudd-go/internal/auto/audit.go:57-66 wraps any subprocess error uniformly as `audit subprocess: %w`.
unified_concerns.persona_impact: obj#1 (verify working code, platform-wide) — audit is the surface that answers 'is the fleet healthy?' for Stefano, but has no unit coverage and no distinction between timeout / quota-exhaustion / LLM-crash / bad-prompt failures. CLI caller at audit.go:97 just os.Exits(1).
unified_concerns.vision_promise_violated: Audit is explicitly positioned in vision.md (v3.4) as fleet-wide persona validation — a surface with zero tests contradicts the safety-infrastructure ethos.
unified_concerns.remediation: Add (a) audit_test.go smoke test with a stub subprocess, (b) exit-code → classification map (timeout vs quota vs generic), (c) surface the classification to operator stderr.

unified_concerns.title: Zombie active change — skeleton persists across sessions without advancing
unified_concerns.evidence: sudd/changes/active/discovered_audit_handoff-validator-template-cleanup_01/ — has proposal.md (Apr 19 19:52), design.md (Apr 19 21:40), tasks.md, personas/ but NO log.md, NO specs.md, NO SUMMARY.md. Dates 2026-04-19 19:52 unchanged as of 2026-04-20 — not moved, not progressed, not archived.
unified_concerns.persona_impact: obj#2 (autonomous progress) + obj#4 (identify stuck items) — a change that is neither advancing nor marked STUCK is invisible to the retry-escalation ladder.
unified_concerns.vision_promise_violated: Ralph Loop contract: every active change must resolve to DONE / DONE_DIRTY / STUCK. A skeleton without log.md that persists >24h is neither.
unified_concerns.remediation: Either (a) populate specs.md and resume via /sudd-apply, (b) explicitly STUCK-archive with a reason, or (c) auto-sweep `active/` for entries lacking log.md older than N hours in runAutoCmd.

unified_concerns.title: Dead/partial: RollupSessionStats orphaned with stale docstring
unified_concerns.evidence: sudd-go/internal/auto/state.go:467-514 — exported, comments say 'Called once at session end', but runAutoCmd (auto.go:500-507) documents that rollup is no longer done there because IncrementChangeStats bumps inline.
unified_concerns.persona_impact: obj#3 (understand what changed) indirectly — risk is future maintainer re-wiring the rollup and reintroducing the mid-session-crash stat-loss regression that inline stats were designed to fix.
unified_concerns.remediation: Either delete RollupSessionStats OR update docstring + mark //lint:ignore + add regression test asserting it is never called.

unified_concerns.title: Framework integrity test does not cross-check live vs embedded template agent count
unified_concerns.evidence: sudd-go/internal/installer/framework_integrity_test.go asserts live count != 0 but never compares fs.WalkDir of live sudd/agents/ to templateFS sudd/agents/.
unified_concerns.persona_impact: obj#2 — exactly the v3.8.x self-wipe scenario (template shrinks below live) still leaks past the guardrail.

unified_concerns.title: Dead conditional in RunDiscovery (identical branches for opencode/claude)

cross_validation.note: Not applicable — no FE surface. Cross-validation slot retained for schema conformance; score inferred from manifest/reality drift instead (see cli_surface_discrepancies and unified_concerns).

claimed_preflight_fail_loud.evidence: auto.go stderr-warning-on-SaveState pattern; auto/state.go non-atomic write

summary.headline: The framework is internally consistent at the 35-agent and safety-infra level, but three issues materially violate its own stated invariants: (C1) state.json non-atomic writes, (C2) SaveState stderr-warn-and-continue pattern, and (C5) a zombie active change with no log.md that has not advanced in 27+ hours. Supporting gaps: fleet CLI advertised but not registered, audit has zero Go tests, and orphaned RollupSessionStats with stale docstring.
summary.highest_severity: UC-1 (CRITICAL): state.json non-atomic write in sudd-go/internal/auto/state.go:178. Any crash mid-SaveState produces unparseable JSON; LoadState on next `sudd auto` returns fmt.Errorf("parse state.json: %w") and the CLI os.Exit(1)s — effectively bricks the session until manual recovery.
